stemHtml: Which of these is the correct answer regarding sunrise and sunset times, considering a location in the Northern Hemisphere.

options.a: Sunrise and sunset times vary with the date because of the changing distance between the Earth and the Sun.
options.b: For a given latitude, on the 1st May, sunrise occurs earlier than on the 19th May.
options.c: Sunrise and sunset times vary with latitude because of the tilt of the Earth's rotational axis.
options.d: On the 31st of May, the Sun will set earlier at 60°N compared to a location at 30°N.
